channel.title: Posts on LinuxRepos
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on LinuxRepos

item.title: Install Arch Linux
item.description: How to Install Arch Linux: A Comprehensive Guide If you’re someone who enjoys the thrill of customizing your Linux system to your exact specifications, then Arch Linux might be the perfect distribution for you.

item.title: Updated the Theme
item.description: Today I updated my websites theme to look a bit nicer but i will be doing more later.

item.title: The Launch of Shellfetch
item.description: Hello guys and gals, today I have launched my all new and improved fetch tool called shellfetch

item.title: New Website
item.description: Welcome to our website over the past few weeks we have been hard at work to bring you the best site we could.
